description_long: This SUV features a sharply angular, geometric body with a matte black finish, reminiscent of the Tesla Cybertruck's futuristic design. The front end is flat and wide, with narrow, horizontal headlights and subtle yellow accent lines at the corners. The side profile reveals a continuous, sloped roofline and large, polygonal wheel covers that add to its modern, armored appearance. The windows are tinted and seamlessly integrated into the body, with no visible door handles or trim. The rear is flat with a single red horizontal light bar stretching across its width, emphasizing its minimalistic aesthetic. The overall design is bold, utilitarian, and exudes a sense of strength and innovation.
description: A matte black, angular SUV with a futuristic, armored design, polygonal wheels, and minimalistic lighting details.
description_view_0: Front view shows a flat, wide face with narrow headlights and yellow corner accents.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the continuous sloped roof, large polygonal wheels, and seamless windows.
description_view_2: Rear view displays a flat back with a single red horizontal light bar and no visible exhaust or trim.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the same angular body, polygonal wheels, and integrated windows.
attribute_wheel_design: Polygonal, metallic wheel covers with a faceted, futuristic appearance
